data.title: Pharming Group announces the 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Pharming Group N.V. has announced that its Annual General Meeting for 2026 has been scheduled for Thursday, May 28, 2026, commencing at 14:00 CET. The meeting documents can be accessed on the company's official website Pharming.com.

data.description: EDF has confirmed the pricing of its senior multi-tranche bond offering, with a total nominal value of $2.75 billion.

data.title: Q3 Trading Statement 2025/26:  Bang & Olufsen generated 1% revenue growth in local currencies for the quarter
data.description: Bang & Olufsen experienced a 1% rise in revenue in local currencies for the quarter, falling short of expectations. The gross margin showed strong progress, reaching 57.5%, up by 2.1 percentage points from the previous year. Like-for-like sell-out rose by 1%, while Win Cities saw a considerable 16% growth in sell-out figures.

data.title: CSG secures another major contract. It will supply artillery ammunition worth hundreds of millions of euros to a European customer
data.description: CSG, a prominent global industrial and technology group, has secured a substantial new agreement to provide large-calibre ammunition to a European client, valued at almost €300 million. This contract, among others recently acquired by CSG, further solidifies the company’s dominance in the European market for large-calibre ammunition. By enhancing its manufacturing capabilities, CSG exhibits its agility in meeting the increasing requirements from military forces internationally.

data.title: BTC hits $76K resistance with 11K exchange inflows, signaling sellers at key levels amid rally.
data.description: The recent surge in Bitcoin's value, reaching $76,000, has raised concerns due to a significant increase in hourly exchange inflows, which have reached 11,000 BTC. Data from CryptoQuant indicates that sellers are preparing to sell at crucial resistance levels.

data.title: BitMEX suggests Quantum Canary Fund as alternative to BTC freeze, opposes BIP-361. Bounty-based initiative to tackle quantum threats.
data.description: BitMEX Research is advocating for a cautious approach towards quantum threats by introducing a bounty-based canary fund. This move contrasts the proposed coin freeze under BIP-361, which has sparked controversy. The canary fund serves as a proactive measure to address potential risks related to quantum technology. This decision comes amidst growing concerns in the industry regarding quantum threats. It underscores the significance of readiness in the face of evolving technological challenges. The fund's structure incentivizes the identification and mitigation of such risks through a collaborative effort. The bounty-based system encourages individuals to contribute to the fund by rewarding successful identification and resolution of quantum vulnerabilities. This approach showcases a proactive stance towards enhancing security measures in the cryptocurrency space. The decision reflects a balanced strategy of preparedness while avoiding drastic measures such as coin freezes. Stay updated for more information on this developing initiative.

data.title: Appointments in Suominen Leadership Team
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Suominen Corporation announced the appointment of Liisa Pursiheimo, a dual Finnish-American citizen with a Master's degree in Economics and International Business, as the Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO) and a part of the Suominen Leadership Team. The appointment is set to take effect on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Pernod Ricard: Improving Momentum With Stable Organic Net Sales in Q3 in a Volatile Context
data.description: In Paris on April 16, 2026, Pernod Ricard (Paris: RI) announced a positive development in their Organic Net Sales for Q3 compared to H1, with total group volumes rising by 4% and Strategic International Brands experiencing a 3% growth. Excluding the US and China markets, which saw a decline of 12% and 7% in Q3 respectively, the rest of the world reported a robust 5% increase in Organic Net Sales. The company noted a notable improvement in sales trends.
